mapper.select:
SELECT cm.id, cm.cover, cm.name, org.name AS schoolName, cm.credit, cm.sale_num AS saleNum, cm.view_num AS viewNum, cm.edit_time AS editTime, cm.state FROM credit_mall cm LEFT JOIN org ON cm.school_id = org.id WHERE cm.deleted = 0
AND cm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND cm.state = #{query.state}
ORDER BY cm.edit_time DESC
